inputs.label: Profit Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Desired profit margin as percentage of cost

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired profit margin as percentage of cost
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maliyetin yüzdesi olarak istenen kar marjı
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschte Gewinnmarge als Prozentsatz der Kosten

businessContext_i18n.es: Margen de beneficio deseado como porcentaje del coste

businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de taxe de vente applicable
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de impuesto a las ventas aplicable

formulas.sellingPrice: ((materialCostPerUnit + laborCostPerUnit) * quantity + overheadFixed) / quantity * (1 + profitMarginPercent / 100) * (1 + taxRatePercent / 100)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
